description_long: This object is a spherical coffee machine with a striking, cosmic-inspired exterior featuring a deep purple and black color palette. The surface is adorned with a grid of faint lines and scattered, glowing magenta dots, evoking the appearance of a starry night sky. The finish is smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible seams, buttons, or traditional coffee machine components such as a spout, portafilter, or control panel. The object appears monolithic and seamless, suggesting a highly stylized or conceptual design. There are no visible openings, handles, or interactive elements on any side. The overall impression is of a futuristic or decorative appliance rather than a conventional, functional coffee machine.
description: A spherical, cosmic-themed coffee machine with a smooth, glossy surface in deep purple and magenta, lacking visible controls or openings.
description_view_0: The surface is predominantly dark purple with scattered magenta dots and faint grid lines, no visible controls or openings.
description_view_1: This view shows a brighter magenta area with a more pronounced grid pattern, still no visible features or components.
description_view_2: The surface is darker with fewer visible magenta highlights, maintaining the seamless, glossy appearance.
description_view_3: A balanced mix of dark purple and magenta with a subtle grid, no distinguishable interactive parts.
